title: Dreamycraft 2
description:
The Dreamycraft 2 Modded Adventures modpack specifically made for the Dreamy lounges Minecraft Project.

This modpack includes a lot of different things with magic, tech and suprises.
body:
This is the Dreamycraft 2 Modded Adventures Modpack, it is a modpack designed for the Dreamy lounges minecraft server can however be used by anyone!

It includes Tech mods and magic mods predominantely but also features decoration world gen and exploration.

This modpack includes:

Tech Mods!  
These being Create, Mekanism, Oritech and Pneumaticcraft.

Magic Mods!  
Ars Noveau and Occultas.

And a new Dimension to explore and build!  
The Aether

New Foods and Drinks!  
With farmers delight and various expansions.

And much more!  
Accesories, Artifacts, Character Customization,   
a remastered ender dragon fight, storage and backpack mods.

Also a bunch of optimization and world generation mods!  
Terralith, Stoneworks and a bunch of new structures.

The modpack has gone through many iterations since starting and is made to be used with friends who just want to play and have fun!
